title: Test Issue 6
description: No-code test issue with 4 phases to validate kanban board and active work tracking

phases.title: Verify desktop app components
phases.description: Confirm the desktop app has all expected component directories: layout, sidebar, terminal, detail, kanban, and work.
phases.verification: All component directories exist under apps/desktop/src/components/

phases.title: Verify Zustand stores
phases.description: Confirm that the Zustand store files exist in apps/desktop/src/stores/ including tikiStateStore and any kanban-related stores.
phases.verification: Store files exist in the stores directory

phases.title: Verify Tauri backend modules
phases.description: Confirm the Rust backend has the expected modules: commands.rs, watcher.rs, and state.rs in apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/.
phases.verification: All three Rust module files exist

phases.title: Verify state schema
phases.description: Confirm that the state schema JSON file exists and contains the expected top-level properties: schemaVersion, activeWork, and history.
phases.verification: state.schema.json contains all expected top-level properties
